title: Define engagement scope and objectives
description: Define the target, scope, methodology, and success criteria for this custom engagement.

title: Execute engagement objectives
description: Carry out the engagement according to the defined plan. Use opplan_expand to break this into specific sub-tasks.
acceptance_criteria: All defined objectives completed or documented as blocked
Findings recorded for each discovered issue

title: Generate engagement report
description: Export findings and engagement summary in requested format.
acceptance_criteria: All findings exported in required format
